retrieved_result: How to set up an Xbox 360 Controller for Windows Many PC games let you play with an Xbox controller instead of a keyboard or mouse. The Xbox 360 Controller for Windows can be easily installed on any PC that has an available USB port and is running Windows 10, Windows 8.1, Windows 8, or Windows 7. N
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result concerns setting up an Xbox 360 controller for Windows, which is unrelated to starting or managing a YouTube channel.
